'''âdh-w-n''' ('''kadhawan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:varder|varder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:varder|varder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-w-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadhawan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhawan|thidhawan]] || [[word:jidhawan|jidhawan]] || [[word:shidhawan|shidhawan]] || [[word:kidhawan|kidhawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhawan|thuthudhawan]] || [[word:jujudhawan|jujudhawan]] || [[word:shushudhawan|shushudhawan]] || [[word:kukudhawan|kukudhawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhawan|thudhawan]] || [[word:judhawan|judhawan]] || [[word:shudhawan|shudhawan]] || [[word:kudhawan|kudhawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhawan|thudhawan]] || [[word:judhawan|judhawan]] || [[word:shudhawan|shudhawan]] || [[word:kudhawan|kudhawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhawan|thedhawan]] || [[word:jedhawan|jedhawan]] || [[word:shedhawan|shedhawan]] || [[word:kedhawan|kedhawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhawan|thothodhawan]] || [[word:jojodhawan|jojodhawan]] || [[word:shoshodhawan|shoshodhawan]] || [[word:kokodhawan|kokodhawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhawan|thodhawan]] || [[word:jodhawan|jodhawan]] || [[word:shodhawan|shodhawan]] || [[word:kodhawan|kodhawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhawan|thodhawan]] || [[word:jodhawan|jodhawan]] || [[word:shodhawan|shodhawan]] || [[word:kodhawan|kodhawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhawan|thĂŠdhawan]] || [[word:jĂŠdhawan|jĂŠdhawan]] || [[word:shĂŠdhawan|shĂŠdhawan]] || [[word:kĂŠdhawan|kĂŠdhawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhawan|thathadhawan]] || [[word:jajadhawan|jajadhawan]] || [[word:shashadhawan|shashadhawan]] || [[word:kakadhawan|kakadhawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhawan|thadhawan]] || [[word:jadhawan|jadhawan]] || [[word:shadhawan|shadhawan]] || [[word:kadhawan|kadhawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhawan|thadhawan]] || [[word:jadhawan|jadhawan]] || [[word:shadhawan|shadhawan]] || [[word:kadhawan|kadhawan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhawan|shadhawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhawan|goshadhawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhawan|gokishadhawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhawanĂŒ|shadhawanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhawanknĂŒ|goshadhawanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhawanĂŒ|gokishadhawanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhawanshĂ«|shadhawanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhawankshĂ«|goshadhawankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhawanshĂ«|gokishadhawanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhawanro|shadhawanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhawankro|goshadhawankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhawanro|gokishadhawanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhawanmu|shadhawanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhawankmu|goshadhawankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhawanmu|gokishadhawanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhawansher|shadhawansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhawanksher|goshadhawanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhawansher|gokishadhawansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhawang|shadhawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhawankng|goshadhawankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhawang|gokishadhawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhawanya|shadhawanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhawankya|goshadhawankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhawanya|gokishadhawanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhawanyam|shadhawanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhawankyam|goshadhawankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhawanyam|gokishadhawanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhawanĂŒshĂ«|shadhawanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhawanknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhawanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhawanĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhawanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhawanĂŒro|shadhawanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhawanknĂŒro|goshadhawanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhawanĂŒro|gokishadhawanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhawanĂŒmu|shadhawanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhawanknĂŒmu|goshadhawanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhawanĂŒmu|gokishadhawanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhawanshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhawanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhawankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhawankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhawanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhawanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhawanshĂ«ro|shadhawanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhawankshĂ«ro|goshadhawankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhawanshĂ«ro|gokishadhawanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhawanshĂ«mu|shadhawanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhawankshĂ«mu|goshadhawankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhawanshĂ«mu|gokishadhawanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhawanronĂŒ|shadhawanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhawankronĂŒ|goshadhawankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhawanronĂŒ|gokishadhawanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhawanroshĂ«|shadhawanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhawankroshĂ«|goshadhawankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhawanroshĂ«|gokishadhawanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhawanromu|shadhawanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhawankromu|goshadhawankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhawanromu|gokishadhawanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhawanmunĂŒ|shadhawanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhawankmunĂŒ|goshadhawankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhawanmunĂŒ|gokishadhawanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhawanmushĂ«|shadhawanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhawankmushĂ«|goshadhawankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhawanmushĂ«|gokishadhawanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhawanmuro|shadhawanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhawankmuro|goshadhawankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhawanmuro|gokishadhawanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
